briefdescription.para: Portrait orientation. The height of the display area is greater than the width. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Landscape orientation. A wide view area is needed. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Portrait inverse orientation. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Landscape inverse orientation. @SINCE_2_0.0.
No orientation. It is used to initialize or unset the preferred orientation. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Enumeration for orientation of the window is the way in which a rectangular page is oriented for normal viewing.

detaileddescription.para: This Enumeration is used the available orientation APIs and the preferred orientation.

briefdescription.para: A default window type. Indicates a normal, top-level window. Almost every window will be created with this type. @SINCE_2_0.0.
A notification window, like a warning about battery life or a new E-Mail received. @SINCE_2_0.0.
A persistent utility window, like a toolbox or palette. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Used for simple dialog window. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Used for Ime keyboard window. It should be set in application New function. @SINCE_2_0.33.
Used for desktop windows. @SINCE_2_2.1.

An enum of Window types. Window type has effect of DALi window's behavior, window's stack and extra functions. The default window type is NORMAL. If application does not set the specific window type, this type will be set.

detaileddescription.para: Ime window type is special type. It can only set by one Application::New function. The fuction is "New(int* argc, char** argv[], Dali::StringView stylesheet, Application::WindowOpacity windowOpacity, PositionSize positionSize, WindowType type)". Ime window type can not set by Window::SetType().

briefdescription.para: No notification level. Default level. This value makes the notification window place in the layer of the normal window. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Base notification level. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Higher notification level than base. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Higher notification level than medium. @SINCE_2_0.0.
The highest notification level. @SINCE_2_0.0.
An enum of notification level. @SINCE_2_0.0.
The mode which turns the screen off after a timeout. @SINCE_2_0.0.
The mode which keeps the screen turned on. @SINCE_2_0.0.
An enum of screen mode. @SINCE_2_0.0.
None state. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Transition effect is started. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Transition effect is ended. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Enumeration for transition effect's state. @SINCE_2_0.0.
None type. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Window show effect. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Window hide effect. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Enumeration for transition effect's type. @SINCE_2_0.0.
Failed for unknown reason.
Succeed.
Permission denied.
The operation is not supported.
The operation is invalid. (e.g. Try to operate to the wrong window)
An enum of window operation result.
Start resizing window to the top-left edge.
Start resizing window to the top side.
Start resizing window to the top-right edge.
Start resizing window to the left side.
Start resizing window to the right side.
Start resizing window to the bottom-left edge.
Start resizing window to the bottom side.
Start resizing window to the bottom-right edge.
Enumeration of direction for window resized by display server.
Status bar.
Keyboard.
Clipboard.
Enumeration of window insets part type.
Invisible.
Visible.
Enumeration of window insets part state.
default value for blur disable
the window's background
the window's behind except background
Enumeration of window blur type.
Status bar.
Keyboard.
Clipboard.
Enumeration of window insets part flag.
Enumeration for the synchronization is ended between UI(transparent hole) and video player.
Pointer to Dali::NativeImageSurface.
The major version number of the Adaptor.
The minor version number of the Adaptor.
The micro version number of the Adaptor.
The date/time the Adaptor library was built.

memberdef.argsstring: (const unsigned char *const pixelBuffer, const std::string &filename, const Pixel::Format pixelFormat, const std::size_t width, const std::size_t height)
memberdef.name: EncodeToFile

detaileddescription.para: Store the given pixel data to a file. The suffix of the filename determines what type of file will be stored, currently only jpeg and png formats are supported.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the pixel data
Filename to save
The format of the buffer's pixels
The width of the image in pixels
The height of the image in pixels

simplesect.para: true if the file was saved

memberdef.argsstring: (const unsigned char *const pixelBuffer, const std::string &filename, const Pixel::Format pixelFormat, const std::size_t width, const std::size_t height, const uint32_t quality)
memberdef.name: EncodeToFile

detaileddescription.para: Store the given pixel data to a file. The suffix of the filename determines what type of file will be stored, currently only jpeg and png formats are supported.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the pixel data
Filename to save
The format of the buffer's pixels
The width of the image in pixels
The height of the image in pixels
The value to control image quality for jpeg file format in the range [1, 100]

simplesect.para: true if the file was saved

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &url, ImageDimensions size=ImageDimensions(0, 0), FittingMode::Type fittingMode=FittingMode::DEFAULT, SamplingMode::Type samplingMode=SamplingMode::BOX_THEN_LINEAR, bool orientationCorrection=true)
memberdef.name: LoadImageFromFile

briefdescription.para: Load an image synchronously from local file.

simplesect.para: This method is thread safe, i.e. can be called from any thread.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the image file to load.
The width and height to fit the loaded image to, 0.0 means whole image
The method used to fit the shape of the image before loading to the shape defined by the size parameter.
The filtering method used when sampling pixels from the input image while fitting it to desired size.
Reorient the image to respect any orientation metadata in its header.

simplesect.para: handle to the loaded PixelBuffer object or an empty handle in case loading failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &url, std::vector< Devel::PixelBuffer > &buffers, ImageDimensions size=ImageDimensions(0, 0), FittingMode::Type fittingMode=FittingMode::DEFAULT, SamplingMode::Type samplingMode=SamplingMode::BOX_THEN_LINEAR, bool orientationCorrection=true)
memberdef.name: LoadImagePlanesFromFile

briefdescription.para: Load an image and save each plane to a separate buffer synchronously from local file.

simplesect.para: This method is thread safe, i.e. can be called from any thread. If the image file doesn't support to load planes, this method returns a bitmap image instead.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the image file to load.
The loaded PixelBuffer object list or an empty list in case loading failed.
The width and height to fit the loaded image to, 0.0 means whole image
The method used to fit the shape of the image before loading to the shape defined by the size parameter.
The filtering method used when sampling pixels from the input image while fitting it to desired size.
Reorient the image to respect any orientation metadata in its header.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Dali::Vector< uint8_t > &buffer, ImageDimensions size=ImageDimensions(0, 0), FittingMode::Type fittingMode=FittingMode::DEFAULT, SamplingMode::Type samplingMode=SamplingMode::BOX_THEN_LINEAR, bool orientationCorrection=true)
memberdef.name: LoadImageFromBuffer

briefdescription.para: Load an image synchronously from encoded buffer.

simplesect.para: This method is thread safe, i.e. can be called from any thread.

parameterdescription.para: The encoded buffer of the image to load. The buffer is not owned by FileStream and must be valid for entire lifetime of FileStream
The width and height to fit the loaded image to, 0.0 means whole image
The method used to fit the shape of the image before loading to the shape defined by the size parameter.
The filtering method used when sampling pixels from the input image while fitting it to desired size.
Reorient the image to respect any orientation metadata in its header.

simplesect.para: handle to the loaded PixelBuffer object or an empty handle in case loading failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t *buffer, size_t bufferSize, ImageDimensions size=ImageDimensions(0, 0), FittingMode::Type fittingMode=FittingMode::DEFAULT, SamplingMode::Type samplingMode=SamplingMode::BOX_THEN_LINEAR, bool orientationCorrection=true)
memberdef.name: LoadImageFromBuffer

briefdescription.para: Load an image synchronously from encoded buffer.

simplesect.para: This method is thread safe, i.e. can be called from any thread.

parameterdescription.para: The encoded buffer of the image to load. The buffer is not owned by FileStream and must be valid for entire lifetime of FileStream
Size of the encoded buffer.
The width and height to fit the loaded image to, 0.0 means whole image
The method used to fit the shape of the image before loading to the shape defined by the size parameter.
The filtering method used when sampling pixels from the input image while fitting it to desired size.
Reorient the image to respect any orientation metadata in its header.

simplesect.para: handle to the loaded PixelBuffer object or an empty handle in case loading failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &filename, ImageDimensions size=ImageDimensions(0, 0), FittingMode::Type fittingMode=FittingMode::DEFAULT, SamplingMode::Type samplingMode=SamplingMode::BOX_THEN_LINEAR, bool orientationCorrection=true)
memberdef.name: GetClosestImageSize

briefdescription.para: Determine the size of an image that LoadImageFromFile will provide when given the same image loading parameters.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a synchronous request. This function is used to determine the size of an image before it has loaded.
filename
name of the image.
size
The requested size for the image.
fittingMode
The method to use to map the source image to the desired dimensions.
samplingMode
The image filter to use if the image needs to be downsampled to the requested size.
orientationCorrection
Whether to use image metadata to rotate or flip the image, e.g., from portrait to landscape.
dimensions that image will have if it is loaded with given parameters.

briefdescription.para: Get the size of an original image. this method will respect any rotation of image.

parameterdescription.para: name of the image.
Reorient the image to respect any orientation metadata in its header.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &url, ImageDimensions size=ImageDimensions(0, 0), FittingMode::Type fittingMode=FittingMode::DEFAULT, SamplingMode::Type samplingMode=SamplingMode::BOX_THEN_LINEAR, bool orientationCorrection=true)
memberdef.name: DownloadImageSynchronously

briefdescription.para: Load an image synchronously from a remote resource.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the image file to load.
The width and height to fit the loaded image to, 0.0 means whole image
The method used to fit the shape of the image before loading to the shape defined by the size parameter.
The filtering method used when sampling pixels from the input image while fitting it to desired size.
Reorient the image to respect any orientation metadata in its header.

simplesect.para: handle to the loaded PixelBuffer object or an empty handle in case downloading or decoding failed.

briefdescription.para: get the maximum texture size.
Set the thread name.

parameterdescription.para: The name of thread. The name can be up to 16 bytes long, and should be null-terminated if it contains fewer bytes.

detaileddescription.para: Factory function for native surface A native surface is created.

parameterdescription.para: the size of the surface to create
the native surface handle of your platform. If you don't pass this, a native surface will be created.
Whether the surface has an alpha channel

briefdescription.para: < for uint8_t
